SEARCH
Package io.github.jy95.fds.common.functions

Interface PeriodToString<P extends org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IBase,D extends org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IPrimitiveType<Date>,C extends FDSConfig>

Type Parameters:
P - The type of the period object.
D - The type of the date objects within the period.
C - The type of the configuration used for translation.
All Known Implementing Classes:
PeriodToStringR4, PeriodToStringR5
public interface PeriodToString<P extends org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IBase,D extends org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IPrimitiveType<Date>,C extends FDSConfig>
Interface for converting a period to a human-readable string.
Since:
2.1.9
Author:
jy95

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default CompletableFuture<String>
    convert(TranslationService<C> translationService, P period)
    Provides enhanced logic for converting a period to a human-readable string.

    Extract information about the boundsPeriod
    String

  • Method Details

    • hasStart

      boolean hasStart(P period)

    • hasEnd

      boolean hasEnd(P period)

    • getStart

      D getStart(P period)

    • getEnd

      D getEnd(P period)

    • formatDateTime

      String formatDateTime(TranslationService<C> translationService, D date)

    • getConditionCode

      default String getConditionCode(boolean hasStart, boolean hasEnd)
      Determines the formatting condition code for the period.
      Parameters:
      hasStart - True if the period has a start date.
      hasEnd - True if the period has an end date.
      Returns:
      The conditional code ("0", "1" or "other").

    • extractInformation

      default Map<String,Object> extractInformation(TranslationService<C> translationService, P data)
      Extract information about the boundsPeriod
      Parameters:
      translationService - The service providing localized string translations.
      data - The data object to analyze
      Returns:
      A map

    • convert

      default CompletableFuture<String> convert(TranslationService<C> translationService, P period)
      Provides enhanced logic for converting a period to a human-readable string.
      Parameters:
      translationService - The service providing localized string translations.
      period - The period object to convert.
      Returns:
      A CompletableFuture that resolves to the human-readable string for the period.
